title: RemediationPlan
description: A prioritized remediation plan derived from root-cause clusters. Buckets clusters into Fix Now / Next Sprint / Backlog batches and provides score projections.

current_score.description: Current overall audit score before any remediation.

fix_now.description: Clusters requiring immediate attention (critical severity or high impact).

next_sprint.description: Clusters to address in the next sprint (high severity or moderate impact).

backlog.description: Clusters that can be deferred to the backlog.

score_after_fix_now.description: Projected overall score after resolving all Fix Now clusters.

score_after_all.description: Projected overall score after resolving all clusters.

summary.description: Human-readable executive summary of the remediation plan.

impact_score.description: Computed impact score (0–100). Higher = more urgent.

effort.description: Estimated effort to address the cluster.

estimated_score_delta.description: Estimated overall score improvement if this cluster is resolved.
